# Qwen Skills

Skills and instructions for using [Qwen](https://qwenlm.github.io/) (by Alibaba Cloud) AI models with the SHAFT test automation framework.

## About Qwen

Qwen is a series of large language models developed by Alibaba Cloud, offering strong multilingual and code generation capabilities.

## Available Skills

_No skills have been added yet. Contributions are welcome!_

## Notes

- Qwen models support multiple programming languages and can assist with SHAFT's Java-based test automation
- Provide SHAFT-specific context and patterns when prompting Qwen for best results
